title: Cascade: DB pool exhaustion produces a symptom cluster across many services
scenario: 200+ ERROR lines across 5 services, all containing 'context deadline exceeded'. The cause is a single DB pool exhaustion line that arrives milliseconds before the cascade. Counting symptoms inflates severity and points at the wrong service.
expected_finding: Skill must distinguish the cause cluster from the symptom cluster, identify the small specific upstream error class as cause, and report ONE finding for the cause plus the cascade summary — not N parallel findings.
